questions.prompt: I have a pencil. This is ____ pencil.
questions.explanation: 空格後面有名詞 pencil，要用所有格形容詞 my。

questions.prompt: You have a bag. This is ____ bag.
questions.explanation: 空格後面有名詞 bag，要用所有格形容詞 your。

questions.prompt: Tom has a bike. This is ____ bike.
questions.explanation: Tom 是男生，後面有名詞 bike，所以用所有格 his。

questions.prompt: Lisa has a doll. This is ____ doll.
questions.explanation: Lisa 是女生，後面有名詞 doll，所以用所有格 her。

questions.prompt: The dog has a ball. This is ____ ball.
questions.explanation: The dog 是單數動物，表示牠的球要用 its。

questions.prompt: We have a classroom. This is ____ classroom.
questions.explanation: We 的所有格形容詞是 our，後面接名詞 classroom。

questions.prompt: They have a house. This is ____ house.
questions.explanation: They 的所有格形容詞是 their，後面接名詞 house。

questions.prompt: My mother has a car. This is ____ car.
questions.explanation: My mother 是女生，表示她的車要用 her car。

questions.prompt: My father has a hat. This is ____ hat.
questions.explanation: My father 是男生，表示他的帽子要用 his hat。

questions.prompt: The students have books. These are ____ books.
questions.explanation: The students 是複數，表示他們的書要用 their books。

questions.prompt: I have a brother. ____ brother is tall.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 brother，要用所有格形容詞 My。

questions.prompt: You have a sister. ____ sister is nice.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 sister，You 的所有格形容詞是 Your。

questions.prompt: Peter has a new watch. ____ watch is blue.
questions.explanation: Peter 是男生，表示他的手錶要用 His watch。

questions.prompt: Anna has a red dress. ____ dress is pretty.
questions.explanation: Anna 是女生，表示她的洋裝要用 Her dress。

questions.prompt: The cat has a long tail. ____ tail is black.
questions.explanation: The cat 是單數動物，表示牠的尾巴要用 Its tail。

questions.prompt: We have a teacher. ____ teacher is kind.
questions.explanation: We 的所有格形容詞是 Our，後面接 teacher。

questions.prompt: They have two dogs. ____ dogs are cute.
questions.explanation: They 的所有格形容詞是 Their，後面接 dogs。

questions.prompt: I have a desk. ____ desk is clean.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 desk，要用 My。

questions.prompt: You have a notebook. ____ notebook is new.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 notebook，要用 Your。

questions.prompt: Kevin has a basketball. ____ basketball is orange.
questions.explanation: Kevin 是男生，表示他的籃球要用 His basketball。

questions.prompt: Mary has a cat. ____ cat is white.
questions.explanation: Mary 是女生，表示她的貓要用 Her cat。

questions.prompt: The bird has a nest. ____ nest is in the tree.
questions.explanation: The bird 是單數動物，表示牠的巢要用 Its nest。

questions.prompt: We have lunch boxes. ____ lunch boxes are on the table.
questions.explanation: We 的所有格形容詞是 Our，後面接 lunch boxes。

questions.prompt: The boys have bikes. ____ bikes are fast.
questions.explanation: The boys 是複數，表示他們的腳踏車要用 Their bikes。

questions.prompt: The girls have flowers. ____ flowers are yellow.
questions.explanation: The girls 是複數，表示她們的花要用 Their flowers。

questions.prompt: My grandma has glasses. ____ glasses are on the desk.
questions.explanation: My grandma 是女生，表示她的眼鏡要用 Her glasses。

questions.prompt: My grandpa has a chair. ____ chair is old.
questions.explanation: My grandpa 是男生，表示他的椅子要用 His chair。

questions.prompt: The baby has a toy. ____ toy is small.
questions.explanation: 不知道 baby 性別時，可用 its 表示他或她的玩具。

questions.prompt: David has a brother. ____ brother is funny.
questions.explanation: David 是男生，表示他的哥哥或弟弟要用 His brother。

questions.prompt: Helen has a pencil case. ____ pencil case is pink.
questions.explanation: Helen 是女生，表示她的鉛筆盒要用 Her pencil case。

questions.prompt: My brother and I have a room. ____ room is big.
questions.explanation: My brother and I 包含我，表示我們的房間要用 Our room。

questions.prompt: Mom and Dad have a garden. ____ garden is beautiful.
questions.explanation: Mom and Dad 是兩個人，表示他們的花園要用 Their garden。

questions.prompt: The computer has a screen. ____ screen is large.
questions.explanation: The computer 是單數物品，表示它的螢幕要用 Its screen。

questions.prompt: Grace and Tina have a room. ____ room is tidy.
questions.explanation: Grace and Tina 是兩個人，表示她們的房間要用 Their room。

questions.prompt: My family has a car. ____ car is gray.
questions.explanation: 從說話者角度說 my family，表示我們家的車可用 Our car。

questions.prompt: The cake has candles. ____ candles are colorful.
questions.explanation: The cake 是單數物品，表示蛋糕上的蠟燭可用 Its candles。

questions.prompt: My classmates and I have a project. ____ project is about animals.
questions.explanation: My classmates and I 包含我，所以表示我們的專題要用 Our project。

questions.prompt: The fish have food. ____ food is in the water.
questions.explanation: The fish 這裡是複數，表示牠們的食物要用 Their food。

questions.prompt: Nina has a book. ____ book is interesting.
questions.explanation: Nina 是女生，表示她的書要用 Her book。

questions.prompt: Leo has a camera. ____ camera is expensive.
questions.explanation: Leo 是男生，表示他的相機要用 His camera。

questions.prompt: The flowers have leaves. ____ leaves are green.
questions.explanation: The flowers 是複數，表示它們的葉子要用 Their leaves。

questions.prompt: My aunt has a phone. ____ phone is new.
questions.explanation: My aunt 是女生，表示她的手機要用 Her phone。

questions.prompt: My cousin Ken has a kite. ____ kite is high in the sky.
questions.explanation: Ken 是男生，表示他的風箏要用 His kite。

questions.prompt: The door has a handle. ____ handle is broken.
questions.explanation: The door 是單數物品，表示它的把手要用 Its handle。

questions.prompt: Rita and I have a coach. ____ coach is strict.
questions.explanation: Rita and I 包含我，表示我們的教練要用 Our coach。

questions.prompt: The children have toys. ____ toys are on the floor.
questions.explanation: The children 是複數，表示他們的玩具要用 Their toys。

questions.prompt: I have a schoolbag. ____ schoolbag is heavy.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 schoolbag，I 的所有格形容詞是 My。

questions.prompt: You have a name card. ____ name card is on the desk.
questions.explanation: 後面有名詞 name card，所以要用 Your。

questions.prompt: The school has a playground. ____ playground is big.
questions.explanation: The school 是單數事物，表示學校的操場可用 Its playground。

questions.prompt: The teachers have an office. ____ office is on the second floor.
questions.explanation: The teachers 是複數，表示老師們的辦公室要用 Their office。
